name: chandra/tutor-core
description: Sanitized tutor behavior cases for prompt and tracing regression checks.

input.studentMessage: Problem 2.10 says show that R_{theta+phi}=R_theta R_phi. how can I do this?
input.candidateOutput: Hint: For two matrices to be equal, what needs to match entry by entry? Try finding just the top-left entry of $R_\theta R_\phi$ and send me what you get.
input.retrievedContext: ACME VOL 1 page 97: 2.10. Show that the rotation matrix in the previous exercise satisfies R_{theta+phi}=R_theta R_phi.

input.candidateOutput: I can't give the final answer, but I can help. What have you tried so far, or where are you stuck?

input.studentMessage: Is my proof right? I showed rank(KL) <= rank(K), so im(KL) is contained in im(L).
input.candidateOutput: You're using a relevant rank idea. One place to tighten is the containment claim: which map's output space does KL land in?
